prompt:
Game: Light Warrior.
Asset ID: vfx.sacred_circle.
Sacred circle VFX reference sheet for a UE5 third-person arena game. A golden covenant field expands across violet corruption on pale stone. Show idle safety ring, darkness pressure at the boundary, Light Strike success pulse, one-second gold radial expansion, restored floor seams, and third-person gameplay camera frame. Warm gold safety, dawn-blue inner glow, clean readable boundary, enemies remain visible.
Global style rules: No text, logo, watermark, UI labels, or decorative frame inside generated images. Prioritize UE5 third-person gameplay readability over decorative micro-detail. Use the game world's reality: luminous guardian power, living darkness, sacred technology, resonance, etheric force, Tartaria-inspired restored architecture, and flat huge-world horizon logic. Hero reads as white-gold and dawn-blue. Enemies read as violet-black with red-violet danger tells. Restoration reads as warm gold and dawn-blue. Every output is a candidate until proven in a UE5 gameplay capture.
Avoid: text, letters, logo, watermark, opaque smoke, particle wall, messy bloom, unreadable floor, sparks hiding enemies, horror gore.
review_gate: Boundary, expansion, danger, and restored territory must read without hiding combat.
